items.text:
we just shipped support for rubrics in deepagents ✅
give your agent a clear definition of what "done" looks like, and force it to run in a loop until said goal is complete
this is similar to /goal in claude code, but works for any agent (not just a coding agent)

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: Gemma-4 QAT just dropped! We found if you naively convert from QAT Q4_0 BF16, you will lose accuracy since the conversion to llama.cpp has a different lattice. Unsloth dynamic GGUFs recovers most of it! 26B-A4B: 85.6% top-1 % from 70.2% (+15.4%)

items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 QAT+Unsloth GGUF优化，实用部署
items.summary: Gemma-4 QAT just dropped! We found if you naively convert from QAT Q4_0 BF16, you will lose accuracy since the conversion to llama.cpp has a different lattice. Unsloth dynamic GGUFs recovers most of it! 26B-A4B: 85.6% top-1 % from 70.2% (+15.4%)

items.text: We just published internal data on how much of Claude's development is already being done by Claude: Over 80% of all code merged into our codebase is now written by Claude. It's been months since many researchers at Anthropic hand-wrote code. The typical Anthropic engineer ships 8x as much code as they did in 2024.

roundup.title: FrontierCode Sets New Bar for Maintainable Agent Code
roundup.subtitle: 新 coding eval 曝光 slop 问题，vLLM-Omni 与 Agent 框架同步升级
headline: @cognition 发布 FrontierCode benchmark，强调可维护代码质量而非仅通过测试，SOTA 模型在 Diamond 集上仅 13.4%。@swyx 与 @VictorTaelin 指出超半数 SWE-Bench 结果为不可合并 slop，引发 AI coding 评估标准讨论。
@vllm_project 推出 vLLM-Omni v0.22.0，支持 omnimodal world models 与生产级多模态 serving，兼容 NVIDIA Cosmos 3 并带来更广量化与硬件覆盖。@NVIDIAAI 同期公布 Blackwell NVFP4 精度训练 Llama 3 实现 1.31–1.73× 加速且零精度损失。
@LangChain 提出 Agent Development Lifecycle 框架，强调 Build→Test→Deploy→Monitor→Improve 全流程生产化实践。@LangChain_OSS 同步为 deepagents 添加 rubrics 功能，帮助 Agent 明确“完成”定义并循环执行。
@AnthropicAI 发布科学博客，探讨 Agent 在生物领域的基础设施瓶颈，指出 bio 数据库如同“汽车前建造的城市”。@OpenAI 则公布最新发展规划，强调长期普惠目标。

deepDives.title: FrontierCode：专注可维护代码的新 coding eval
deepDives.summary: @cognition 推出 FrontierCode，每个任务由开源维护者投入 40+ 小时构建，旨在解决模型生成“能跑但难维护”代码的问题。

facts.text: FrontierCode Diamond 集上当前 SOTA 仅 13.4%。
@METR_Evals 发现超半数 SWE-Bench 结果为不可合并 slop。
facts.quote: more than half of SWEBench results is unmergeable slop

bullish.text: We don't need a model's output to work today, we need it not to break tomorrow

bullets.text: @LangChain 提出 Agent Development Lifecycle 全流程框架
@LangChain_OSS 为 deepagents 添加 rubrics，支持明确完成定义并循环执行
@OpenRouter 推出 Advisor 工具，让小模型咨询高智模型逃脱 doom loop
@vllm_project 发布 vLLM-Omni v0.22.0，339 commits、124 contributors
@NVIDIAAI 公布 Blackwell NVFP4 训练 Llama 3 实现 1.31–1.73× 加速
bullets.quote: 1.31–1.73× faster than FP8, with zero accuracy loss

takeaways: FrontierCode 标志 coding eval 从“能跑”转向“可维护”，AI 工程师需更新测试策略。
vLLM-Omni 与 Blackwell NVFP4 同时落地，多模态生产 serving 成本进一步下降。
Agent Development Lifecycle 与 rubrics 功能提示，生产级 Agent 已进入系统化工程阶段。
